title: MDI Result
description: The envelope a worker publishes (to the address named by the dispatch message's reply_to) to report the outcome of a task. This schema is the language-neutral source of truth for the MDI message contract; the canonical Go binding lives in github.com/nyudlts/go-mdi (package mdi).
$comment: A cross-field constraint that JSON Schema cannot express: when both start_time and end_time are present, start_time must be <= end_time. Validators and services must enforce this.

version.description: The envelope schema version (semver). The current contract version is 1.0.0.

request_id.description: Echo of the dispatch request_id (the task id) — the deterministic idempotency key.

job_id.description: The id of the job this task belongs to.

task_id.description: The id of the task that was performed.

outcome.description: Whether the task succeeded or failed. Drives the orchestrator's on_success / on_failure workflow branch.

data.description: Optional worker output, persisted by the orchestrator to the task.

agent.description: Identifies the worker that produced this Result.

start_time.description: Optional operation start timestamp. When present, ISO-8601 UTC (RFC 3339 with a trailing "Z").

end_time.description: Optional operation finish timestamp. When present, ISO-8601 UTC (RFC 3339 with a trailing "Z"), and >= start_time.

host.description: The host the worker ran on.
